---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution
How should it work? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Mockups, references, related issues, or examples from other projects.
